title: tagetes tenuifolia
intro: Tagetes tenuifolia, also known as Mexican marigold or signet marigold, is a flowering plant native to Mexico, characterized by its bright yellow and orange flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Tagetes tenuifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
